name: Hot Apple Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and quarter the apples.
2. Combine all ingredients except cream in a saucepan.
3. Bring to boil.
4. Simmer 15 minutes until apples are soft.
5. Puree; return to pan.
6. Add cream and heat through but do not boil.
7. Garnish each serving with a dollop of unsweetened whipped cream and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
You can even serve this soup for brunch - it's a Fall soup, when apples are a part of the celebration.
